title: Snowy Villager Hotel
description: Adds a snowy villager hotel to snow biomes
body:
Snowy Villager Hotel:

A cozy but mysterious retreat hidden deep within the frozen wilderness.


![Outside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe5392357a3be950d528803c38fe5e473173851d_0.webp)





Snowy balconies, and detailed winter interiors bring this structure to life.
Inside, players can discover supplies, secrets, and villagers seeking refuge from the harsh cold.

You are free to include this mod in your modpacks.
